supported.title: 100+ supported sites
supported.desc: Works on popular video platforms across mobile and desktop.

collection.title: Collection / playlist download
collection.desc: Auto-detect collection, season, and playlist links and queue the full set when supported. Example links: Bilibili multi-part or collection pages, TikTok playlist links, and YouTube playlist links such as https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLAUHyQdeCeUQzyftt9qhHh-xGYyfk7w1V

batch.title: Batch download
batch.desc: Paste multiple links separated by spaces or line breaks and process them together.

watermark.title: Watermark-free download
watermark.desc: Save clean video files when the platform provides no-watermark sources.

audio.title: Audio-only and mute mode
audio.desc: Switch between auto, audio-only, and mute mode before downloading.

points_balloon.title: Points running low
points_balloon.text: Click to learn how to earn more points.

platforms.title: Watermark-Free Download from Popular Platforms
platforms.description: Supports 100+ popular sites including TikTok, Bilibili, Sohu Video, NicoNico, Kuaishou, Kugou Music, Haokan, Toutiao, Weibo, Amazon Live, NAVER, Xiaohongshu, CCTV, YouTube, Instagram, Threads, Twitter, Facebook, etc. Analyze and download HD files directly on mobile and PC.

douyin.name: TikTok/Douyin Downloader
douyin.desc: Supports domestic and international versions of TikTok/Douyin. One-click watermark removal, keeping HD audio and video.

bilibili.name: Bilibili Video Downloader
bilibili.desc: Supports anime, uploader submissions, and course videos. Preserves clarity and subtitles.

kuaishou.name: Kuaishou Watermark Remover
kuaishou.desc: Copy Kuaishou links to analyze. Batch downloading is more efficient.

haokan.name: Haokan Video Downloader
haokan.desc: Paste a Haokan/Baidu video link to save available MP4 quality variants, including HD options when provided by the source.

toutiao.name: Toutiao Video Downloader
toutiao.desc: Paste a public Toutiao video link to save available MP4 quality variants, including HD options when the source provides them.

sohu.name: Sohu Video Downloader
sohu.desc: Download public Sohu Video pages as MP4, with audio-only and mute modes available.

weibo.name: Weibo Video Downloader
weibo.desc: Copy the Weibo video address or t.cn short link to extract available MP4 quality options.

amazon.name: Amazon Live Downloader
amazon.desc: Save public Amazon Live replay videos from amazon.com/live/video or amazon.com/vdp links with available HLS quality options.

xiaohongshu.name: Xiaohongshu Video Saver
xiaohongshu.desc: Removes in-app watermarks, keeping cover images and original HD sound.

instagram.name: Instagram Reels Downloader
instagram.desc: Supports Reels, posts, and story videos. Save directly to your local device.

youtube.name: YouTube Video Downloader
youtube.desc: Direct YouTube video and audio downloads are now supported. Paste a link and download instantly. Supports Shorts and multiple quality options.

facebook.name: Facebook Video Downloader
facebook.desc: Parses both public and private share links. Multiple resolutions available.

twitter.name: X (Twitter) Video Saver
twitter.desc: Copy tweet links to extract original videos while maintaining clarity.

naver.name: NAVER Video Downloader
naver.desc: Save public NAVER videos from naver.me and m.naver.com/shorts links.

niconico.name: NicoNico Video Downloader
niconico.desc: Save public NicoNico watch and shorts videos with available HLS quality options.

threads.name: Threads Video Downloader
threads.desc: Paste a public Threads post link to save available videos or photos directly.

videorecord.desc: Create, move, and resize slides, then record whiteboard tutorials with camera overlay in your browser. No install required.

random_video.desc: Randomly match one online user for a 10-minute 1v1 video chat.

remux.desc: remuxing often fixes compatibility issues with old software. it's fast, lossless, and everything is processed on-device.

file_transfer.desc: The best way to transfer files between devices without installing apps. Secure P2P file sharing, cross-platform clipboard sync. Fast, free, and private.

discover_trends.desc: Collection of the hottest videos on the web. Curated beauty videos, funny clips, and viral trends. Updated daily.

hero.title: Download Videos Online Without Watermarks
hero.subtitle: Paste a link from Douyin, TikTok, Bilibili, Sohu Video, Kugou Music, Haokan, Weibo, Amazon Live, NAVER, NicoNico, Xiaohongshu, CCTV, Instagram, Threads, Facebook, YouTube, and more to download HD videos in a few clicks.
hero.trust: Batch downloads, collection / playlist parsing, audio-only mode, and mute mode are built in for supported services.

tools.title: More tools
tools.description: Need more than downloading? These tools stay one tap away without taking over the homepage.
